meta.title: Chihuahuas for Grandma
meta.subtitle: Hand-picked adoptable dogs — cuddly lap companions around 5–6 lbs when possible.

targetWeightLbs.note: Rough guide; confirm with the shelter or foster.

dogs.name: Bella (example)
dogs.lapDogNote: Example: foster says she seeks out laps and sleeps under the covers.
dogs.summary: Gentle girl who wants to be held and nap beside you.
dogs.details:
Replace this card with a real dog. This placeholder shows how details appear here so Grandma can read everything in one place — age, weight, and whether they are truly cuddly — without hopping between adoption sites.

When you add a real listing, paste in the description from the site (you can shorten it), and note anything the foster said about being held or sleeping on laps.
